ddls:
CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., sensor, actuator) */,
  "identifier_for_vendor" INTEGER /* Identifier for the vendor of the device */,
  "device_model" TEXT /* Model number of the device */,
  "device_serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the device */,
  "device_firmware_version" TEXT /* Initial firmware version of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor reading */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device that collected the reading */,
  "logging_time" REAL /* Timestamp of when the reading was logged */,
  "logging_sample" INTEGER /* Sample number of the reading */,
  "accelerometer_timestamp_since_reboot" INTEGER /* Timestamp of the accelerometer reading since device reboot */,
  "reading_type" TEXT /* Type of reading (e.g., accelerometer, gyroscope) */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the reading (e.g., good, bad, uncertain) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the reading */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_readings_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accelerometer_data" (
  "accelerometer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accelerometer reading */,
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor reading that collected the accelerometer data */,
  "acceleration_x" REAL /* X-axis acceleration reading */,
  "acceleration_y" REAL /* Y-axis acceleration reading */,
  "acceleration_z" REAL /* Z-axis acceleration reading */,
  "axis_orientation" TEXT /* Orientation of the accelerometer axes */,
  "sensitivity" REAL /* Sensitivity of the accelerometer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("accelerometer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accelerometer_data_reading_id FOREIGN KEY ("reading_id") REFERENCES sensor_readings ("reading_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gyroscope_data" (
  "gyroscope_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gyroscope reading */,
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor reading that collected the gyroscope data */,
  "rotation_x" REAL /* X-axis rotation reading */,
  "rotation_y" REAL /* Y-axis rotation reading */,
  "rotation_z" REAL /* Z-axis rotation reading */,
  "gyro_timestamp_since_reboot" INTEGER /* Timestamp of the gyroscope reading since device reboot */,
  "axis_orientation" TEXT /* Orientation of the gyroscope axes */,
  "sensitivity" REAL /* Sensitivity of the gyroscope */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gyroscope_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gyroscope_data_reading_id FOREIGN KEY ("reading_id") REFERENCES sensor_readings ("reading_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, engineer, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor reading being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the sensor data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method used to access the data (e.g., API, web interface) */,
  "data_exported" INTEGER /* Amount of data exported during the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_reading_id FOREIGN KEY ("reading_id") REFERENCES sensor_readings ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device version */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device associated with the version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Number of the device software version */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the device software was updated */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the version changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_versions_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)
